models.name: train
models.description: Weekly sales fact table — each row is one (Store, Dept, Date) combination with weekly sales amount. 421K rows, 45 stores, 81 departments, date range 2010-02 to 2012-10.

columns.name: Store
columns.description: Store identifier (1-45), foreign key to stores dimension

columns.name: Dept
columns.description: Department identifier (1-99), representing product category within a store

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Week start date (Friday), format YYYY-MM-DD

columns.name: Weekly_Sales
columns.description: Sales amount in USD for this store-department-week. Can be negative (returns/adjustments).

columns.name: IsHoliday
columns.description: Whether the week contains a major holiday: Super Bowl, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas. Holiday weeks have 5x weight in Kaggle competition evaluation.

dimensions.name: stores
dimensions.description: Store dimension — 45 Walmart stores with type classification (A=large supercenter, B=medium, C=small) and square footage.

columns.name: Store
columns.description: Store identifier (1-45)

columns.name: Type
columns.description: Store type classification: A (supercenters, >150K sqft), B (medium stores), C (small neighborhood stores). 22 type-A, 17 type-B, 6 type-C.

columns.name: Size
columns.description: Store square footage (34,875 to 219,622)

dimensions.name: features
dimensions.description: Regional/temporal features per store-week — macroeconomic indicators, weather, and promotional markdowns. Contains NAs in MarkDown columns (markdowns started Nov 2011).

columns.name: Store
columns.description: Store identifier (1-45)

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Week start date

columns.name: Temperature
columns.description: Average regional temperature in Fahrenheit

columns.name: Fuel_Price
columns.description: Regional fuel price in USD per gallon

columns.name: MarkDown1
columns.description: Promotional markdown type 1 in USD. NA before Nov 2011. Use COALESCE(MarkDown1, 0).

columns.name: MarkDown2
columns.description: Promotional markdown type 2 in USD. NA before Nov 2011. Use COALESCE(MarkDown2, 0).

columns.name: MarkDown3
columns.description: Promotional markdown type 3 in USD. NA before Nov 2011. Use COALESCE(MarkDown3, 0).

columns.name: MarkDown4
columns.description: Promotional markdown type 4 in USD. NA before Nov 2011. Use COALESCE(MarkDown4, 0).

columns.name: MarkDown5
columns.description: Promotional markdown type 5 in USD. NA before Nov 2011. Use COALESCE(MarkDown5, 0).

columns.name: CPI
columns.description: Consumer Price Index for the region (economic indicator)

columns.name: Unemployment
columns.description: Regional unemployment rate as percentage

columns.name: IsHoliday
columns.description: Whether the week contains a major US holiday

derivedFields.name: Active_Promotion
derivedFields.description: True if any MarkDown is active (non-zero) for this store-week
derivedFields.expression: (COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown1" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown2" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown3" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown4" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown5" AS DOUBLE),0)) > 0

derivedFields.name: Total_MarkDown
derivedFields.description: Sum of all markdown types for this store-week (USD)
derivedFields.expression: COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown1" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown2" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown3" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown4" AS DOUBLE),0) + COALESCE(TRY_CAST(features."MarkDown5" AS DOUBLE),0)

derivedFields.name: Sales_Per_SqFt
derivedFields.description: Weekly sales normalized by store size (sales efficiency)

metrics.name: total_weekly_sales
metrics.description: Total sales across all stores and departments

metrics.name: holiday_weighted_sales
metrics.description: Holiday-weighted sales — holidays count 5x (Kaggle WMAE metric). Use this when evaluating model or comparing holiday impact.

measure.name: weighted_sales
measure.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN IsHoliday THEN Weekly_Sales * 5 ELSE Weekly_Sales END)

metrics.name: store_performance
metrics.description: Per-store performance metrics with store type breakdown

metrics.name: monthly_revenue_trend
metrics.description: Monthly aggregated revenue trend for time-series analysis

metrics.name: promotion_effectiveness
metrics.description: Compare sales with vs without active promotions (MarkDown). Only meaningful after Nov 2011 when markdowns started.

metrics.name: yoy_comparison
metrics.description: Year-over-year same-week comparison. Use EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Date) and EXTRACT(WEEK FROM Date) to align weeks across years.
